creator: eternalenvy@hush.com
text:
The i2p port is now so badly out of date, over three years out of date
in fact, that it cannot even connect to the latest versions of this
software and having this outdated version installed is a major security
risk.

Fix: 

Update to the latest version, which is 0.9.18.1.
How-To-Repeat: Look at the official changelog for i2p and compare it with the version
in ports, then weep at how ports can be abandoned for more than 3 years.

https://geti2p.net/announcements.html
